_comment: USDC (cable) venue sweep configuration - single source of truth for regimes & environment.
CSV paths relative to the repo root (run via `make sim-sweep-usdc`); data from
sim/data/fetch_dukascopy.sh (Dukascopy GBP/USD 1m BID candles - Binance can't supply cable).
max_gap_min 4320 (72h) forward-fills forex weekends/bank holidays - matching what the frozen
on-chain Chainlink feed reports over a weekend.
gilt-2022: mini-budget stress, Sep-26 flash low ~1.035 - surcharge cap + range breach + oracle
deadband under violence. gas 10 gwei / ETH $1300 (era-consistent risk-off).
calm-2024: cable pinned ~1.25-1.29 - isolates pure ratchet-conveyor economics; the static-5
control row in this regime is the acceptance anchor vs the observed live pool.
trend-2025: sustained GBP uptrend ~1.21->1.34 - fair RISES so the pool goes wstGBP-rich:
the only regime exercising the mint-side loop; disciplines the mint-side base.
nav: discrete weekly ratchet (the conveyor driver): 9 bps/week ~ 4.8% APY, phase 3d.
